review: The pre‚ÄëFM Miller SBD delivers a clear mix that lets Keith‚Äôs keyboards shine, though occasional muddiness and right‚Äëchannel dropouts are noted. ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is ~4.4/5; most comments are enthusiastic about performance and sound, with only minor technical complaints.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear mix with prominent keyboards; some reviewers note muddy mids and occasional FM dropouts on the right channel, but overall listenable.
